title: Mitch Daniels to serve as Purdue interim president
description: WEST LAFAYETTE — The Purdue Board of Trustees at a public session on Monday voted to approve the appointment of Mitch Daniels to serve as interim president of Purdue University, effective July 1.

title: Growing Sino-Russian Cooperation Worries India
description: At the Beijing summit, Putin and Xi oversaw the signing of 20 pacts. But a much-anticipated deal on the Power of Siberia-1 pipeline did not materialize.

title: Wrench attackers kidnap and rob city worker of more than £10k after night out
description: Three men from towns on the south Essex border have been sentenced following a violent kidnapping and robbery in Shoreditch.
